Dashboard.startScanSub: Upload an image to begin reverse search analysis

common.noResults: No data available for this view.

dashboard.title: Platform dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor content volume, subscriptions, and recent admin activity from a single operations surface.

metricHints.totalContent: All indexed searches and analysis jobs.
metricHints.members: All members currently registered on the platform.
metricHints.activeSubscriptions: Members with an active paid subscription.
metricHints.revenue: Gross subscription revenue reported for the current month.

dashboard.recentActivityDescription: Latest member and subscription events returned by the admin dashboard API.
dashboard.systemSnapshotDescription: A quick read on processing throughput and search demand.
dashboard.quickLinksDescription: Jump directly into the admin lists that need follow-up.

quickLinks.usersDescription: Open user management to inspect plans, activity, and account status.
quickLinks.searchesDescription: Track uploaded searches across every member account.
quickLinks.apiUsageDescription: Open derived usage metrics based on the documented admin endpoints.

users.title: User management
users.description: Filter and review all members, their subscription tier, and account activity.

summary.totalMembersHint: Total records reported by the current users query.
summary.visibleMembersHint: Members returned for the current filter set.
summary.activeAccountsHint: Active members in the current results window.
summary.proPlansHint: Members on the Pro tier in the current page.

users.tableDescription: Search by name, filter by account status, and open a member record for full detail.
users.empty: No members matched the current filters.

memberDetails.title: Member details for {name}
memberDetails.description: Review subscription state, account health, and recent searches before taking action.
memberDetails.loadingDescription: Fetching member profile and recent searches.
memberDetails.errorDescription: The requested member profile could not be fetched.

metricHints.credits: Current available credits on the account.
metricHints.monitors: Monitoring jobs currently tied to this member.
metricHints.searches: Lifetime search count returned by the admin API.
metricHints.referrals: Successful referrals linked to the member code.

memberDetails.profileDescription: Identity, approval state, and primary account metadata.
memberDetails.searchesDescription: Paginated search history for this member from the admin user searches endpoint.
memberDetails.searchesEmpty: This member has no searches in the current range.
memberDetails.subscriptionDescription: Billing identifiers and status for the linked subscription record.
memberDetails.adminActionsDescription: Deactivate the member account when moderation or policy action is required.
memberDetails.deactivateReasonPlaceholder: Optional note for why the account is being deactivated.

searches.title: Searches
searches.description: Inspect uploaded search jobs across all members and filter by operator-visible status.

summary.totalHint: Total records reported by the current searches query.
summary.completedHint: Completed search jobs inside the current page.
summary.averageDiscoveriesHint: Average discovery count for the visible searches.
summary.uploadersHint: Members represented in the current result window.

searches.tableDescription: Filter by uploader name or search status and jump into the uploader account when needed.
searches.empty: No searches matched the current filters.

apiUsage.title: API usage
apiUsage.description: Operational usage metrics derived from the documented admin dashboard and searches endpoints.

metricHints.totalRequests: Total analyzed content returned by the dashboard endpoint.
metricHints.successRate: Analysis complete divided by total content.
metricHints.averageDiscoveries: Average discovery count across the recent search sample.
metricHints.activeMembers: Member count reported by the dashboard endpoint.

apiUsage.breakdownDescription: Distribution of recent search records by admin-visible processing state.
apiUsage.empty: No usage insight data is available yet.
apiUsage.topUploadersDescription: Members with the highest search volume in the current recent-search sample.
apiUsage.topUploaderHint: Recent uploads in sampled search history
apiUsage.snapshotDescription: Key counters from the dashboard response for fast operator review.
apiUsage.methodologyDescription: How this page is calculated using the available admin API surface.
apiUsage.methodologyCopy: Usage metrics combine the admin dashboard response with the latest {count} search records because the documented admin API does not expose a dedicated usage analytics endpoint.
